# datahub_field_assertion (Resource)

**DataHub ❌ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Creates and manages a DataHub field (column) assertion monitor on a dataset.

Field assertions check a single column. `FIELD_VALUES` evaluates every row's value against an operator (e.g. `id >= 0`); `FIELD_METRIC` evaluates an aggregate column metric (e.g. `NULL_COUNT = 0`).

## Sub-types

Set `field_assertion_type = "FIELD_VALUES"` with `operator` + a value (`single_value` or `min_value`/`max_value`), optionally `transform_type`, `fail_threshold_type`/`fail_threshold_value`, and `exclude_nulls`. Set `field_assertion_type = "FIELD_METRIC"` with `metric` + `operator` + a value. FIELD_VALUES requires a warehouse-backed `source_type` and platform.

## URN

DataHub generates a server-side UUID for each assertion. The `urn` and `id` attributes are populated after creation and are stable across updates. ImportState requires the full assertion URN (e.g. `urn:li:assertion:<uuid>`). Only NATIVE (author-as-code) assertions can be imported; ingested EXTERNAL or smart/AI INFERRED assertions are refused.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_urn` (String) URN of the DataHub dataset this assertion monitors.
- `evaluation_cron` (String) Cron expression defining when DataHub evaluates this assertion.
- `evaluation_timezone` (String) Timezone for the evaluation cron schedule (e.g. `"UTC"`).
- `field_assertion_type` (String) Field assertion sub-type: `FIELD_VALUES` (per-row value check) or `FIELD_METRIC` (aggregate column metric).
- `field_path` (String) Path (name) of the column this assertion checks.
- `field_type` (String) DataHub standard type of the column: `STRING`, `NUMBER`, `BOOLEAN`, `DATE`, `TIME`, `BYTES`, `ENUM`, `FIXED`, `MAP`, `ARRAY`, `UNION`, `STRUCT`, or `NULL`.
- `mode` (String) Monitoring mode. `ACTIVE` enables scheduled evaluation. `PASSIVE` records results without scheduling.
- `operator` (String) Comparison operator, e.g. `EQUAL_TO`, `GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL_TO`, `BETWEEN`, `IN`, `NOT_NULL`.
- `source_type` (String) How DataHub reads the column: `ALL_ROWS_QUERY`, `CHANGED_ROWS_QUERY`, `TABLE_STATISTICS`, or `DATAHUB_DATASET_PROFILE`. FIELD_VALUES requires a query source.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of what this field assertion checks.
- `exclude_nulls` (Boolean) FIELD_VALUES: whether null values are excluded from evaluation. Defaults to `false`.
- `executor_id` (String) ID of the remote executor pool to use for evaluation. Omit to use the default executor.
- `fail_threshold_type` (String) FIELD_VALUES failure threshold mode: `COUNT` or `PERCENTAGE` of failing rows tolerated.
- `fail_threshold_value` (Number) FIELD_VALUES failure threshold value (paired with `fail_threshold_type`).
- `failure_severity` (String) Severity raised when this assertion fails: `LOW`, `MEDIUM`, or `HIGH`. Omit for the DataHub default.
- `field_native_type` (String) Platform-native column type (e.g. `VARCHAR`, `INTEGER`).
- `filter_sql` (String) Optional SQL `WHERE` clause (without the `WHERE` keyword) restricting which rows are checked.
- `max_value` (String) Maximum value (used with `operator = "BETWEEN"`).
- `metric` (String) Column metric for `FIELD_METRIC`: one of `UNIQUE_COUNT`, `UNIQUE_PERCENTAGE`, `NULL_COUNT`, `NULL_PERCENTAGE`, `MIN`, `MAX`, `MEAN`, `MEDIAN`, `STDDEV`, `NEGATIVE_COUNT`, `NEGATIVE_PERCENTAGE`, `ZERO_COUNT`, `ZERO_PERCENTAGE`, `MIN_LENGTH`, `MAX_LENGTH`, `EMPTY_COUNT`, `EMPTY_PERCENTAGE`. Required for FIELD_METRIC.
- `min_value` (String) Minimum value (used with `operator = "BETWEEN"`).
- `on_failure_actions` (List of String) Actions to take when the assertion fails (e.g. `["RAISE_INCIDENT"]`).
- `on_success_actions` (List of String) Actions to take when the assertion passes (e.g. `["RESOLVE_INCIDENT"]`).
- `single_value` (String) Comparison value (used with non-BETWEEN operators).
- `transform_type` (String) Optional FIELD_VALUES transform applied before comparison. Currently `LENGTH`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tags_all` (Set of String) Tag URNs attached by the provider's `defaults.tags`. While non-null, the provider owns the complete `globalTags` list on this entity: tags added outside Terraform show as drift here and are removed on the next apply. Null when `defaults.tags` is not configured and the provider has never written tags to this entity (existing and externally-applied tags are then left untouched).
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this assertion (e.g. `urn:li:assertion:<uuid>`).
